summary: SPK RC 28 lam ro bootstrap worker inline va chan doan dung loi mount/quyen Shared Folder tren DSM.
changes: API ghi log ro hon khi spawn worker inline trong SPK, gom duong dan bootstrap, PID va mount root dang dung de debug worker heartbeat nhanh hon tren NAS.
Runtime transcode tren SPK gio uu tien hien loi mount/quyen Shared Folder that neu package user coopeditor khong doc duoc DSM mount root, thay vi chi bao worker heartbeat da cu.
Import NAS khi gap EACCES tren mounted folder se tra ve thong diep ro rang hon, nhac cap quyen Shared Folder cho package user coopeditor.
Bo sung regression test cho chan doan worker runtime tren SPK va dong bo test worker bootstrap voi kieu du lieu heartbeat SQLite.
